_doc: Two unattended Robots in UnattendedDemo. RobotUser1 is the one failing every job. RobotUser2 is a sibling robot that just succeeded on the same machine (MOCK-HOST). Both robots have LoginToConsole=True — rules out branch 1 (session-config mismatch). The credential path is what differs between them: RobotUser1's credential is stale (see playbook branch 3).

Data.Name: RobotUser1
Data.Description: Unattended Robot for service account UIPATH\USER1 on MOCK-HOST. Credential stored in Orchestrator tenant user record.

Data.Name: RobotUser2
Data.Description: Unattended Robot for service account UIPATH\USER2 on MOCK-HOST.
